faqTitle: AI Outbound Sales Ś Frequently Asked Questions

faqs.q: What is AI outbound sales automation?
faqs.a: AI outbound sales automation uses artificial intelligence to identify ideal prospects, craft personalised outreach messages, and send them at scale across channels like email and LinkedIn Ś without a human SDR manually doing each step. The AI continuously learns from reply data to improve message relevance and timing, creating a self-improving pipeline engine that works around the clock.

faqs.q: How many meetings can AI outbound generate per month?
faqs.a: Results vary by industry, ICP, and offer, but our clients typically book 15¢40 qualified sales meetings per month from a single AI outbound campaign. We optimise continuously based on reply rates, open rates, and booked-meeting data to grow that number over time. In competitive markets with a strong offer, we have achieved 50+ meetings per month for clients.

faqs.q: Is cold email legal in Canada under CASL?
faqs.a: Yes Ś B2B cold email is fully legal in Canada under CASL (Canada's Anti-Spam Legislation), provided messages meet the business-to-business exemption criteria and include proper sender identification and an unsubscribe mechanism. Our campaigns are built to be fully CASL-compliant from day one, including proper sender identification, physical address disclosure, and one-click unsubscribe in every sequence.

faqs.q: Will AI outbound replace my sales team?
faqs.a: AI outbound is designed to augment, not replace, your sales team. The system handles the repetitive top-of-funnel work Ś prospecting, initial outreach, and follow-up Ś so your human salespeople can focus exclusively on closing warm, qualified opportunities. Most clients find their closers book 40¢60% more deals after removing manual prospecting from their daily workflow.

whatIsTitle: The Business Case for Content Marketing in 2026
whatIsText: Content marketing has a fundamental advantage over every paid advertising channel: it compounds. A well-written blog post that ranks on page one for a high-intent keyword generates qualified traffic and leads every single day Ś without ongoing spend. After 12-24 months of consistent content investment, most businesses find their content library generating more leads than their paid channels at a fraction of the cost.

In 2026, content marketing has become even more powerful thanks to AI search. Content that is authoritative, well-structured, and factually credible is the content that AI search engines like Google AI Overviews, ChatGPT Search, and Perplexity cite as their sources. This means that investment in genuinely great content now pays dividends in both traditional organic search rankings and AI-generated answers Ś a double return on every content dollar invested.

faqs.q: How is e-commerce SEO different from regular SEO?
faqs.a: E-commerce SEO requires specialised expertise that general SEO doesn't cover: Product schema markup (price, availability, reviews), faceted navigation handling (filtering by size, colour, brand), category page optimisation, site architecture for large catalogues, and optimising for commercial-intent keywords ('buy', 'best', 'cheap', 'for sale'). A general SEO strategy applied to an e-commerce store will miss the majority of revenue opportunities.

faqs.a: The homepage is just the starting point. Our e-commerce SEO strategy focuses heavily on product pages, collection/category pages, and blog content Ś which is where the majority of organic revenue is actually generated. whatIsTitle: What Is GEO and Why It's the Most Important Marketing Shift of 2025¢2026

Traditional SEO targets the ten blue links. GEO targets the AI-generated answer that now appears before those links for roughly half of all searches. faqs.q: What is Generative Engine Optimisation (GEO)?
faqs.a: GEO is the practice of optimising your website content so that AI-powered search engines like Google AI Overviews, ChatGPT Search, and Perplexity cite your brand when generating answers.
